sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الْأَكْلُ الصِّحِّيُّ يُعِيشُنَا حَيَاةً أَطْوَلَ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, zdrava ishrana produžuje nam život.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, healthy eating helps us live a longer life.

sentences.arabic: أَحَاوِلُ أَنْ آكُلَ الْخُضَارَ وَالْفَاكِهَةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se jesti povrće i voće svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: I try to eat vegetables and fruit every day.

sentences.arabic: الطَّعَامُ السَّرِيعُ لَذِيذٌ لَكِنَّهُ لَيْسَ صِحِّيًّا دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Brza hrana je ukusna ali nije uvijek zdrava.
sentences.translationEn: Fast food is tasty but it is not always healthy.

sentences.arabic: الْجِسْمُ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى طَعَامٍ جَيِّدٍ لِيَعْمَلَ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Tijelu treba dobra hrana da bi pravilno funkcionisalo.
sentences.translationEn: The body needs good food to function properly.
